articles.title: AI Trade Locks In Fresh Gains as S&P 500 Futures Aim for Record
articles.summary: S&P 500 futures rose 0.2% aiming for a new all-time high as the AI trade locked in fresh gains. Nasdaq 100 futures climbed 0.4%. Global equities shrugged off a rebound in oil prices as the US and Iran remained deadlocked over a peace deal.

articles.title: Nasdaq 100 Breaks 30,000 for First Time; US Payrolls Ahead
articles.summary: Nasdaq 100 surged past 30,000 for the first time, driven by AI hardware earnings. Dell's Q1 revenue hit $43.8B (+88% YoY) with AI server revenue surging 757% to $16.1B. UBS tripled Micron target to $1,625, sending it past $1T market cap. WTI crude fell ~10% on Iran ceasefire hopes.

articles.title: US Stock Market Weekly: Record Highs on AI Infrastructure Boom
articles.summary: US equities hit record highs driven by AI enthusiasm and strong earnings. Dell surged 66.5% on 757% AI server growth. Micron +27.4% after UBS $1,625 target. Q1 GDP revised to 1.6%. Consumer sentiment hit all-time low of 44.8. Kevin Warsh is new Fed Chair; first FOMC June 16-17.

articles.title: Nvidia Unveils RTX Spark PC Chip — 'Most Efficient PC Chip Ever Built'

extracted_data.product: RTX Spark — Blackwell GPU + Arm CPU

articles.summary: Nvidia announced the RTX Spark consumer PC chip at Computex, combining Blackwell GPU with Arm-based CPU. Described as 'the most efficient PC chip ever built.' Designed to run AI agents autonomously. Partners include Microsoft, Dell, HP. NVDA +1.9% premarket; Intel, AMD, Qualcomm all down.

articles.title: Jensen Huang COMPUTEX Keynote — Nvidia GTC Taipei Begins Today

extracted_data.conference_focus: AI & computing, robotics & mobility, next-gen technology
extracted_data.ceo_keynote_topics: GPU architecture cadence, Spectrum-X Ethernet, data center + gaming products

articles.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang delivers COMPUTEX keynote today. During COMPUTEX 2024, NVDA rose 10.4%. Conference runs June 2-5 in Taipei. Focus: AI, robotics, next-gen tech. Other executives presenting on robotics/edge AI and networking. Key participants include Intel, Marvell, Microsoft, Qualcomm, SMCI, Synopsys.

articles.title: Dell Q1 FY2027: Revenue $43.8B (+88% YoY), AI Server Revenue +757%
articles.summary: Dell reported blockbuster Q1 FY2027: revenue $43.8B (+88% YoY), crushing $35.74B consensus. EPS $4.86 vs $2.96 expected. AI server revenue surged 757% to $16.1B. AI orders $24.4B with record backlog. Full-year guidance raised to $165-169B. Analysts rushed to hike targets: Citi $475, Evercore/TD Cowen $450. Consensus $421. Stock +66.5% on the week.

articles.title: Micron Hits $1 Trillion Market Cap; UBS Sets $1,625 Target

extracted_data.hbm4_sold_out: 2026 full year, only meeting 50-65% of demand

articles.summary: Micron crossed $1T market cap after UBS analyst Timothy Arcuri raised target 204% to $1,625, arguing MU should trade like NVDA on P/E. Entire 2026 HBM4 supply sold out, meeting only 50-65% of demand. Q2 revenue $23.9B (+196% YoY). Q3 guidance $33.5B. DRAM undersupply expected through at least Q2 2028. Memory prices surging 58-75%.

articles.title: Snowflake Explodes 37% on $6 Billion Amazon Deal — 'AI Inflection Point'
articles.summary: Snowflake surged 37% after beating Q1 estimates and announcing a $6B multi-year AWS deal. Product revenue $1.33B (+34% YoY). CEO Ramaswamy called it an 'AI inflection point.' Full-year product revenue guidance raised to $5.84B (31% growth). 13,600+ accounts using AI capabilities. Snowflake Summit June 3-6 with Investor Day.

articles.title: Salesforce Q1 Earnings Beat, But Guidance Misses — Stock Drops
articles.summary: Salesforce beat Q1: EPS $3.88 vs $3.13, revenue $11.1B vs $11.05B. But Q2 revenue guidance of $11.27-11.35B missed $11.36B consensus. Agentforce ARR reached $1.2B (from $800M). Stock fell ~1% to $176 after-hours, now down 30% YTD. BofA maintains Underperform: 'transforming from high-growth platform to mature cash generator.'

articles.title: Oil Prices Jump 3%+ After Weekend US-Iran Clashes — Brent Above $94
articles.summary: Oil prices surged 3%+ after a weekend exchange of fire between US and Iran. Brent at $94.08, WTI at $90.14. Despite ceasefire talks continuing, weekend clashes reminded markets that a deal isn't done. API reported 6th consecutive weekly crude draw (-2.8M barrels). Dec 2026 WTI futures at ~$79 indicate market confidence in eventual resolution. IEA: 2026 deficit of 1.8 mb/d. Japan crude imports down 66% in April.

articles.title: Stock Market Outlook June 1-5: All-Time Highs Enter June, Iran Deal + AI Key

extracted_data.key_risk: June historically worst month in midterm years
extracted_data.trump_nuclear_demand: Iran must agree never to have nuclear weapon
extracted_data.analyst_quote: Most important: get Strait of Hormuz open, kick can down road on nuclear

articles.summary: Wall Street enters June at all-time highs, betting on Iran resolution and sustained AI earnings. S&P 500 Q1 blended earnings growth >28% (fastest since Q4 2021). Info Tech >54%. May NFP expected +100K. Key earnings: HPE, PANW, AVGO/CRWD. Risk: June historically worst month in midterm election years. Strait of Hormuz reopening is the central bet.

articles.title: SoftBank Overtakes Toyota as Japan's Most Valuable Company — AI Frenzy

extracted_data.arm_holdings: majority stake, soaring on AI demand

articles.summary: SoftBank surged past Toyota to become Japan's most valuable company for first time in 20+ years. Stock +73% YTD, market cap ~47.2T yen. ~$25B in OpenAI gains drove annual profit to ~5T yen (quadrupled). OpenAI stake now worth ~$65B. Announced 75B euro AI data center project in France. Nikkei 225 hit record above 67,000. SoftBank alone added 600+ points in one session.

articles.title: Dollar Steady at 99.00; Euro at $1.165, Yen at 159.41

extracted_data.yen_weakness_context: Markets await Iran war signals, central bank moves

articles.summary: DXY flat at 99.00 after a 0.4% weekly decline. EUR/USD at 1.165, USD/JPY at 159.41. Markets await Iran war developments and central bank signals. Gold slipped 0.4% to $4,518/oz on stronger dollar and rising oil. Rupee under pressure from oil prices and foreign portfolio outflows.

articles.title: Credit Markets: IG OAS at 77 bps — Cycle Tights, Up-in-Quality Theme Persists

extracted_data.schwab_view: Maintain up-in-quality bias, moderate exposure to riskier credit

articles.summary: Investment grade credit spreads at cycle tights of 77 bps OAS. Schwab maintains up-in-quality bias given tight spreads but notes IG yields remain near upper end of 15-year range. New issue activity expanding through Q1-Q2 2026. Spread tightening trend sustained through first five months of 2026.

articles.title: SoFi Surges 12% on SoFiUSD Stablecoin Launch — First Bank-Issued Stablecoin
articles.summary: SoFi launched SoFiUSD — first US bank-issued stablecoin with Mastercard settlement integration. Stock surged 12% to ~$19. Fintech rotation lifted HOOD (+1%) and UPST (+3%) off deep YTD drawdowns (SOFI -35%, HOOD -25%, UPST -25%). Q1 revenue $1.1B, record loan originations $12.2B (+68% YoY).

articles.title: Strategy (MSTR) Moves $30M Bitcoin to Coinbase — Sell-Off Fears Spike

extracted_data.saylor_statement: Selling Bitcoin may be necessary to maximize BTC-per-share over 7 years
extracted_data.ceo_le_statement: Selling near cost basis would avoid meaningful tax consequences

articles.summary: Strategy (MSTR) moved 411.48 BTC (~$30.3M) to Coinbase Prime, sparking Polymarket odds of 84% for a Bitcoin sale before year-end. Saylor and CEO Le previously signaled willingness to sell BTC to maximize per-share value. Total holdings ~850,000 BTC ($65B+). BTC at ~$72,500. MSTR stock flat despite bearish retail sentiment.

articles.title: Space Stocks Slip: SpaceX IPO Valuation Reportedly Below $2 Trillion
articles.summary: Space stocks ASTS, RKLB, RDW, LUNR slipped overnight after reports that SpaceX IPO valuation target fell below $2 trillion. The space sector had rallied hard on SpaceX IPO hype; the lower valuation expectations are cooling that trade.

articles.title: First Solar Surges 17.7% on Analyst Upgrade and CuRe Manufacturing Program

extracted_data.catalyst: Series 6 CuRe Copper Replacement program reduces risk

articles.summary: First Solar surged 17.7% after GLJ Research upgraded to Buy and raised target 52% to $315. The Series 6 CuRe Copper Replacement program at Ohio facility was cited as the risk-reducing catalyst. Stock at $306.11, approaching the new target. Market cap $33B.

articles.title: Week Ahead: ISM PMIs, May Nonfarm Payrolls, Eurozone CPI Flash — War's 4th Month

extracted_data.ecb_expected: June rate hike to combat war-driven inflation
extracted_data.global_pmi: Growth shifted down since war began
extracted_data.stagflation_signals: Flash PMIs show stagflation in developed economies

articles.summary: Key week for data: ISM Manufacturing (Mon), JOLTS (Tue), ISM Services (Wed), May NFP (Fri). Flash PMIs already show cooling job growth and stagflation signals in developed economies. ECB expected to hike in June. Supply chain delays worst since 2022. Consumer services hit especially hard by war. Participation rate at 4+ year low.

articles.title: HPE Q2 Earnings Due Today — Analyst Preview
articles.summary: HPE reports Q2 FY2026 after market close today (June 1). Previous quarter showed strong networking results and increased Cloud & AI profitability, leading to raised FY2026 outlook. Conference call at 5PM ET.
